resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACTN3 rs1815739 CT call is available. This is trait context only and does not predict growth, height, bone density, osteoporosis risk, endocrine status, pediatric growth, injury risk, or exercise clearance.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACTN3 is discussed in fitness research, but growth and bone-health outcomes depend on many genetic and non-genetic factors.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACE ID context row is available. This is not enough to infer growth pattern, bone health, bone density, osteoporosis, endocrine status, imaging findings, lab findings, supplement needs, treatment needs, or exercise clearance.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACE can provide performance-trait context, but it does not determine growth, bone density, pediatric growth status, osteoporosis, endocrine status, or clinical actionability.

growthBoneContext: Use this report as educational growth-and-bone genetics context, not as a growth prediction, bone-density result, osteoporosis assessment, endocrine result, pediatric result, or treatment plan.
Bring growth, bone, endocrine, pediatric, imaging, lab, supplement, treatment, and exercise-clearance questions to qualified professionals when relevant.
